text:
Taler (ターラー, Tārā) is the Private Guard of the Second Prince Camilla in charge of killing the Thirteenth Prince Marayam through a Nen curse. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 37, Chapter 389 

Appearance

Taler has a plump, round face with a prominent forehead and flat nose, narrow eyes, and a big mouth with thin lips. Their straight, fair hair reaches down to their neck and is combed behind their ears. They wear the standard uniform of Camilla's private guards. 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

While Camilla is confined to a room in the VVIP area, Taler and most of her other bodyguards attend a meeting called by Sarahell about Shikaku's suicide. 

Abilities & Powers

Nen

Taler is a Nen user and can cast the same curse as the other Have-Nots in Prince Camilla's employ. 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

The furigana name of the Have-Nots' curse is derived from Japanese mythology, specifically to Izanami's inability to leave the underworld due to having eaten of its food.
The kanji name of the curse, "Tsujitsuma Awase ni Umareta Bokura", is derived from a song by Amazarashi.
Viz localized the curse's name as "Dust in the Wind: Hell Fruit".
